description: Cement the policy decided in conversation: release-plz owns CHANGELOG.md; bullets are auto-generated from commit subjects on each release. The 'why' lives in commit message bodies (now easy with repeatable -m), recoverable via `git show <sha>` or `gh release view vX.Y.Z`. Add a single HTML comment under [Unreleased] that documents this at the point of friction, so the next contributor (human or agent) doesn't reintroduce the dual-source drift we just cleaned up in bl-3751. Doc-only; commit prefixed `balls:` so it skips the next release's changelog.
title: CHANGELOG: mark [Unreleased] as auto-generated; stop hand-curating
